mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_conversation_read (id, user_id, conversation_type, conversation_id, global_seq, last_read_seq, delivery_status, delivery_time, version, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{conversationType}, #{conversationId}, #{globalSeq}, #{lastReadSeq}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{deliveryTime}, 1, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_read_seq = IF(VALUES(last_read_seq) > last_read_seq, VALUES(last_read_seq), last_read_seq), version = version + 1, update_time = VALUES(update_time)
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM im_conversation_read WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND (conversation_type, conversation_id) IN
(#{conv.conversationType}, #{conv.conversationId})
